pattern: allowedTools includes Write and Edit; body states 'DO NOT modify any local files'
description: Read-only research agent declares Write and Edit in allowedTools, contradicting the body's explicit prohibition on file modification. This is a least-privilege violation.
suggested_fix: Remove Write, Edit, NotebookEdit from allowedTools; keep Bash, Read, Glob, Grep, WebFetch, WebSearch, Agent

pattern: allowedTools includes Write and Edit; body states 'not to write files or create outputs'
description: Read-only data-fetching agent declares Write and Edit in allowedTools despite body explicitly stating 'your job is to fetch and return the temperature — not to write files or create outputs'.
suggested_fix: Remove Write, Edit, NotebookEdit, Glob, Grep, WebSearch from allowedTools; keep Bash, Read, WebFetch, Agent

pattern: allowedTools contains 11 tools; body only uses Bash
description: Trivial time-fetching agent (runs one bash command) declares Write, Edit, Glob, Grep, WebFetch, WebSearch, Agent, NotebookEdit, mcp__* — all unused. Write and Edit on a body-level read-only agent violates R11.
suggested_fix: Set allowedTools to just Bash; remove all other declared tools

pattern: allowedTools includes Write and Edit; body says 'Do NOT modify any files'
description: Read-only drift-detection research agent declares Write and Edit in allowedTools, contradicting the body's explicit no-modification instruction.
suggested_fix: Remove Write, Edit, NotebookEdit from allowedTools

suggested_fix: Add 2+ <example> blocks to the description field showing when to invoke this agent

description: Body contains Scenario examples but these are not `<example>` blocks in the description field. Without `<example>` blocks, auto-triggering is unreliable.
suggested_fix: Add 2+ <example> blocks to the description frontmatter field

pattern: Write and Edit declared; body is read-only research
description: Body explicitly states 'Do NOT take any actions or modify files' but Write and Edit appear in allowedTools. NotebookEdit also declared with no notebook operations in body.
suggested_fix: Remove Write, Edit, NotebookEdit from allowedTools

pattern: Write and Edit declared; body is read-only research
description: Body explicitly states 'Do NOT take any actions or modify files' but Write and Edit appear in allowedTools.
suggested_fix: Remove Write, Edit, NotebookEdit from allowedTools

description: 3 occurrences of vague quantifiers without measurable criteria.
suggested_fix: Replace with specific criteria: e.g. 'appropriate' → name the specific condition

description: 5 vague quantifiers without measurable criteria, capped at -10.
suggested_fix: Replace vague terms with specific criteria or enumerated options

description: 5 vague quantifiers without measurable criteria, capped at -10.
suggested_fix: Replace vague terms with specific criteria

pattern: Tools listed in body text but no tools: or allowedTools: frontmatter field
description: Body section 'Tools Available' lists Read, Grep, Glob, WebFetch but no tools frontmatter field is declared. Without frontmatter declaration, Claude Code cannot enforce tool restrictions.
suggested_fix: Add 'allowedTools: [Read, Grep, Glob, WebFetch]' to frontmatter

description: 2 vague quantifiers without measurable criteria.
suggested_fix: Replace with specific criteria

description: 3 vague quantifiers without measurable criteria.
suggested_fix: Replace with specific criteria

description: 2 vague quantifiers without measurable criteria.
suggested_fix: Replace with specific terms

description: CLAUDE.md does not include a build or run command. The repo is a reference implementation rather than an application, but the rubric applies regardless. No setup or run instructions present.
suggested_fix: Add a 'Build/Run' section noting that no build step is required and how to use the repo

description: CLAUDE.md has no instructions for running tests. No test command or test runner is mentioned.
suggested_fix: Add test instructions; at minimum document '/nlpm:test' if applicable or note that no automated tests exist

description: CLAUDE.md does not have a dedicated prerequisites section covering required tools, versions, or setup steps.
suggested_fix: Add a Prerequisites section listing Claude Code version requirements and any system dependencies

description: 4 vague quantifiers without measurable criteria.
suggested_fix: Replace with specific criteria; e.g. 'appropriate logging' → 'logging at INFO level for state transitions and ERROR level for failures'

description: 2 vague quantifiers without measurable criteria.
suggested_fix: Replace with specific terms

description: 2 vague quantifiers without measurable criteria.
suggested_fix: Replace with specific terms

description: 1 vague quantifier without measurable criteria.
suggested_fix: Replace with specific criteria

pattern: No inline code examples — references external reference.md
description: The skill body delegates all examples to external reference.md and examples.md files rather than including inline runnable examples. For a technical SVG-creation skill this reduces standalone usability.
suggested_fix: Add at least one inline SVG template example showing the placeholder replacement pattern

pattern: No scope note or cross-references to related skills
description: Skill does not reference related skills (time-fetcher, time-svg-creator) or explain scope boundaries.
suggested_fix: Add a scope note: 'For fetching time data to pass to agents, see time-fetcher. For SVG output, see time-svg-creator.'

description: Skill covers CSS classes but does not reference presentation-structure or vibe-to-agentic-framework skills.
suggested_fix: Add: 'For slide format and numbering, see presentation-structure. For narrative framework, see vibe-to-agentic-framework.'

description: Skill covers slide format but does not reference presentation-styling or vibe-to-agentic-framework.
suggested_fix: Add scope note linking to presentation-styling and vibe-to-agentic-framework

description: Skill fetches weather data but does not reference weather-svg-creator or weather-agent for the downstream workflow.
suggested_fix: Add: 'For SVG card creation from fetched data, see weather-svg-creator.'

description: No scope note linking to time-fetcher or time-orchestrator workflow.
suggested_fix: Add scope note referencing time-fetcher as the upstream data provider

description: No scope note linking to time-svg-creator or time-agent as downstream consumers.
suggested_fix: Add scope note: 'Output feeds into time-agent and time-svg-creator.'

pattern: Boilerplate allowedTools block (11 tools) reused verbatim across all .claude/agents/ files
description: All agents in .claude/agents/ share an identical allowedTools list. Multiple agents that are read-only by design declare Write and Edit. This is a systemic copy-paste pattern rather than per-agent least-privilege design.
suggested_fix: Audit each agent's body for actually-used tools and tailor allowedTools accordingly

pattern: Zero <example> blocks across all 19 agents in the repository
description: No agent in the entire repository defines <example> blocks. This is a systemic gap affecting all agents' reliability for auto-invocation by Claude Code.
suggested_fix: Add 2+ <example> blocks to each agent's description field, prioritizing agents marked PROACTIVELY
